use_cases: Display client or partner logos on a company homepage with automatic infinite scrolling
Showcase technology integrations or tool logos with smooth looped animation
Present sponsor or customer logos in a continuous horizontal banner
Feature brand logos in a footer or testimonial section with hover-to-pause interaction
Display company logos during events or presentations in a clean, professional format
ai_summary: An infinite logo slider component that smoothly scrolls through brand logos with customizable speed, direction, and hover interactions. Built with Framer Motion for fluid animations and supports both horizontal and vertical layouts. Ideal for showcasing client logos, partner brands, or technology integrations in a seamless looping carousel that automatically pauses on hover.
